response.original_title: What Does “Uphold” Mean? (Easy Explanation for Beginners)
response.overview: What Does “Uphold” Mean? (Easy Explanation for Beginners) Introduction The word “uphold” means to support, maintain, or defend something. +1 -(888)-574-7167  It is often used when talking about rules, laws, beliefs, or values. +1 -(888)-574-7167  When you uphold something, you make sure it stays strong, respected, or followed. +1 -(888)-574-7167 For example: +1 -(888)-574-7167 A judge may uphold a law in court. +1 -(888)-574-7167 A person may uphold their beliefs even when others disagree. +1 -(888)-574-7167 In simple words, to uphold means to keep something right, strong, or in place. +1 -(888)-574-7167  🔍 Google Snippet (Featured Snippet Style Answer) Uphold means to support, maintain, or defend +1 -(888)-574-7167 something such as a rule, law, or belief. It is used when someone keeps something in place or ensures it is respected and followed. +1 -(888)-574-7167
response.title: What Does “Uphold” Mean? (Easy Explanation for Beginners)
